name: small law practices processing 5–15 cases/month tool
description: For small law practices processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient document management causes lost or misplaced files. We provide an organized archiving system instead of manual filing systems or generic document storage solutions.
problem_solved: inefficient document management leading to lost or misplaced files
